title: Opening for Store Manager at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
